    <item>
        <guid>nba529396</guid>
        <title>Stephen Curry: Erupts for 35 points in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephen-curry-3014</link>
        <description>Curry supplied 35 points (12-23 FG, 7-12 3Pt, 4-5 FT), four assists, one rebound and one steal across 36 minutes in Wednesday's 126-121 win over the Clippers in the Play-In Tournament.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 10:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529395</guid>
        <title>Derrick Jones: Starts second half Wednesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/derrick-jones-4083</link>
        <description>Jones (ankle) started the second half of Wednesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Warriors, per the broadcast.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 8:41:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529394</guid>
        <title>Derrick Jones: Leaves for locker room</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/derrick-jones-4083</link>
        <description>Jones exited to the locker room in the second quarter of Wednesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Warriors due to an apparent right ankle injury, Tomer Azarly of ClutchPoints.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 8:20:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529393</guid>
        <title>Stephen Curry: Returns Wednesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephen-curry-3014</link>
        <description>Curry (undisclosed) returned to Wednesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Clippers with 7:59 remaining in the second quarter, per the broadcast.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 8:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529392</guid>
        <title>Stephen Curry: Exits to locker room</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephen-curry-3014</link>
        <description>Curry (undisclosed) exited to the locker room during the first quarter of Wednesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Clippers, Anthony Slater of ESPN.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 7:44:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
